report.technique: Multiparametric prostate MRI at 3T including T2W, DWI (b=50 / 800 / 1400), and dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences.
report.findings: Peripheral zone: diffusely low T2 signal without focal lesion. Transition zone: benign nodular hyperplasia, encapsulated. Seminal vesicles: symmetric, no invasion. Lymph nodes: no enlarged pelvic nodes. Bones: no suspicious marrow lesion.
report.impression:
1. No focal PI-RADS 3 or higher lesion.
2. Overall PI-RADS 2.
